servinfo.title: Air Bag Diagnostic System Check
servinfo.ptxt: Refer to Precautions for Air Bag System Service , Check air bag system according to the following procedure.

servinfosub.title: Air Bag Diagnostic System Check Flow

testgroup.title: DTC check

test1.ptxt: Check DTC referring to DTC Check .

attention3.ptxt: If communication between SUZUKI scan tool and vehicle cannot be established, perform “DLC and Its Communication Check (No Communication to SDM)”.

test1.ptxt: Clear DTC referring to DTC Clearance .

testgroup.question: Is there any DTC(s) when rechecking?

action.ptxt: Go to applicable DTC troubleshooting, and go to Step 5.

test1.ptxt: Perform visual inspection referring to Visual Inspection .

action.ptxt: Repair faulty part or replace it, and go to Step 5.

testgroup.title: Impact sign check

test1.ptxt: Check vehicle for evidence of impact.

testgroup.question: Are there any signs of impact?

action.ptxt: Inspect faulty connections and replace them according to Repair and Inspection Required after Accident , and go to Step 5.

test1.ptxt: Check intermittent problems referring to Intermittent Connection and Poor Contact Inspection .

action.ptxt: Repair faulty part or replace it, and go to Step 5.

test1.ptxt: Confirm that problematic symptom has gone and air bag system is free from any abnormal conditions. If what has been repaired is related to DTC, clear DTC once, check that no DTC is indicated.
